scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/contracts build && concurrently -n contracts,server,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/contracts dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/server dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/web dev"
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/contracts build && corepack pnpm -r test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @vnc-cua/contracts build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
